caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "I NEVER DO SHIT" sits before a professional microphone in a room filled with merchandise and memorabilia. In the background, several framed photographs hang on the wall, and a white mannequin wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and grey pants stands near a clothing rack. Small logos, including one that reads "BOSSILY TOT," are visible on the screen. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth opening and closing as he looks slightly off-camera to the left. His facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, but his position and the background setting remain static. The lighting is bright and consistent, highlighting the various items of clothing and the professional recording equipment in the studio environment.
